title: Google is signing the EU AI Act Code of Practice on Transparency of AI-Generated Content.
excerpt: Signing the code reinforces our commitment to transparency and responsible AI development in Europe.
content_html:
We’re signing the EU AI Act Code of Practice on Transparency of AI-Generated Content to help support the responsible use of AI in Europe. This builds on our 2025 signing of the GPAI Code of Practice and aligns with our ongoing work to adopt and accelerate the C2PA industry standard and to develop AI transparency tools — including SynthID. SynthID is our industry-leading digital watermarking technology that helps people understand how content was created and edited. To promote trust across platforms, we have also been partnering with third-party AI labs like Apple, Eleven Labs, Kakao, NVIDIA, and OpenAI to drive industry-wide adoption of interoperable watermarking tools using SynthID.

While we support transparency, we are concerned that adding more regulatory complexity — as technical solutions are still evolving — could contradict Europe’s goals for competitiveness and simplification. It also risks confusing the people these rules are meant to help. If online content is flooded with overlapping AI labels and legal disclosures, it becomes harder for people to get the clear context they need.

As this code is implemented, we will work together with regulators and partners to build practical solutions that provide real transparency and help people make informed decisions about the content they see online.
content_text: We’re signing the EU AI Act Code of Practice on Transparency of AI-Generated Content to help support the responsible use of AI in Europe. This builds on our 2025 signing of the GPAI Code of Practice and aligns with our ongoing work to adopt and accelerate the C2PA industry standard and to develop AI transparency tools — including SynthID. SynthID is our industry-leading digital watermarking technology that helps people understand how content was created and edited. To promote trust across platforms, we have also been partnering with third-party AI labs like Apple, Eleven Labs, Kakao, NVIDIA, and OpenAI to drive industry-wide adoption of interoperable watermarking tools using SynthID.While we support transparency, we are concerned that adding more regulatory complexity — as technical solutions are still evolving — could contradict Europe’s goals for competitiveness and simplification. It also risks confusing the people these rules are meant to help. If online content is flooded with overlapping AI labels and legal disclosures, it becomes harder for people to get the clear context they need.As this code is implemented, we will work together with regulators and partners to build practical solutions that provide real transparency and help people make informed decisions about the content they see online.

blocks.html_en: We’re signing the EU AI Act Code of Practice on Transparency of AI-Generated Content to help support the responsible use of AI in Europe. This builds on our 2025 signing of the GPAI Code of Practice and aligns with our ongoing work to adopt and accelerate the C2PA industry standard and to develop AI transparency tools — including SynthID. SynthID is our industry-leading digital watermarking technology that helps people understand how content was created and edited. To promote trust across platforms, we have also been partnering with third-party AI labs like Apple, Eleven Labs, Kakao, NVIDIA, and OpenAI to drive industry-wide adoption of interoperable watermarking tools using SynthID.

sentences.en: We’re signing the EU AI Act Code of Practice on Transparency of AI-Generated Content to help support the responsible use of AI in Europe.
sentences.zh: 我们正在签署《欧盟人工智能法案关于人工智能生成内容透明度的实践守则》，以帮助支持欧洲负责任地使用人工智能。

sentences.en: This builds on our 2025 signing of the GPAI Code of Practice and aligns with our ongoing work to adopt and accelerate the C2PA industry standard and to develop AI transparency tools — including SynthID.
sentences.zh: 这建立在我们 2025 年签署 GPAI 实践准则的基础上，并与我们正在进行的采用和加速 C2PA 行业标准以及开发 AI 透明度工具（包括 SynthID）的工作保持一致。

sentences.en: SynthID is our industry-leading digital watermarking technology that helps people understand how content was created and edited.
sentences.zh: SynthID 是我们行业领先的数字水印技术，可帮助人们了解内容的创建和编辑方式。

sentences.en: To promote trust across platforms, we have also been partnering with third-party AI labs like Apple, Eleven Labs, Kakao, NVIDIA, and OpenAI to drive industry-wide adoption of interoperable watermarking tools using SynthID.
sentences.zh: 为了促进跨平台的信任，我们还与 Apple、Eleven Labs、Kakao、NVIDIA 和 OpenAI 等第三方 AI 实验室合作，推动使用 SynthID 的可互操作水印工具在全行业范围内的采用。

blocks.html_en: While we support transparency, we are concerned that adding more regulatory complexity — as technical solutions are still evolving — could contradict Europe’s goals for competitiveness and simplification. It also risks confusing the people these rules are meant to help. If online content is flooded with overlapping AI labels and legal disclosures, it becomes harder for people to get the clear context they need.

sentences.en: While we support transparency, we are concerned that adding more regulatory complexity — as technical solutions are still evolving — could contradict Europe’s goals for competitiveness and simplification.
sentences.zh: 虽然我们支持透明度，但我们担心随着技术解决方案仍在不断发展，增加更多的监管复杂性可能会与欧洲的竞争力和简化目标相矛盾。

sentences.en: It also risks confusing the people these rules are meant to help.
sentences.zh: 它还可能让这些规则旨在帮助的人感到困惑。

sentences.en: If online content is flooded with overlapping AI labels and legal disclosures, it becomes harder for people to get the clear context they need.
sentences.zh: 如果在线内容充斥着重叠的人工智能标签和法律披露，人们就更难获得所需的清晰背景。

blocks.html_en: As this code is implemented, we will work together with regulators and partners to build practical solutions that provide real transparency and help people make informed decisions about the content they see online.

sentences.en: As this code is implemented, we will work together with regulators and partners to build practical solutions that provide real transparency and help people make informed decisions about the content they see online.
sentences.zh: 随着该准则的实施，我们将与监管机构和合作伙伴合作，构建实用的解决方案，提供真正的透明度，并帮助人们对在线看到的内容做出明智的决定。

content_html_zh:
我们正在签署《欧盟人工智能法案关于人工智能生成内容透明度的实践守则》，以帮助支持欧洲负责任地使用人工智能。 这建立在我们 2025 年签署 GPAI 实践准则的基础上，并与我们正在进行的采用和加速 C2PA 行业标准以及开发 AI 透明度工具（包括 SynthID）的工作保持一致。 SynthID 是我们行业领先的数字水印技术，可帮助人们了解内容的创建和编辑方式。 为了促进跨平台的信任，我们还与 Apple、Eleven Labs、Kakao、NVIDIA 和 OpenAI 等第三方 AI 实验室合作，推动使用 SynthID 的可互操作水印工具在全行业范围内的采用。

虽然我们支持透明度，但我们担心随着技术解决方案仍在不断发展，增加更多的监管复杂性可能会与欧洲的竞争力和简化目标相矛盾。 它还可能让这些规则旨在帮助的人感到困惑。 如果在线内容充斥着重叠的人工智能标签和法律披露，人们就更难获得所需的清晰背景。

随着该准则的实施，我们将与监管机构和合作伙伴合作，构建实用的解决方案，提供真正的透明度，并帮助人们对在线看到的内容做出明智的决定。
